scripts.heroku-postbuild: npm dedupe && find node_modules -type f -name '*.map' -delete; find node_modules -type f -name '*.ts' -delete; find node_modules -type f -name '*.md' -delete; find node_modules -type f -name '*.d.ts' -delete; find node_modules -type f -name '*.yml' -delete; find node_modules -type f -name '*.yaml' -delete; find node_modules -type d -name 'test' -exec rm -rf {} +; find node_modules -type d -name 'docs' -exec rm -rf {} +; find node_modules -type d -name 'examples' -exec rm -rf {} +; find node_modules -type d -name 'coverage' -exec rm -rf {} +; rm -rf node_modules/.cache; rm -rf .npm
